# Beautia

> Global collection of beauty designer portfolios — hair, makeup, nail, lash, skin, bridal, semi-permanent. Browse real before/after work, save the looks you love, and book or message the designer directly. Free to browse; multilingual (English / 한국어 / 日本語 / ไทย / 中文).

Beautia is a two-sided discovery and booking platform for independent beauty designers (like Pinterest/Behance for beauty pros). Designers showcase their portfolios and get discovered by new clients worldwide; clients browse real work, save the styles they want, and request that exact look. Listings are auto-sorted by distance from the visitor and can be filtered by city and by category (Hair, Makeup, Nail, Lash, Skin, Bridal). Booking happens in-app or via the designer's existing link (e.g. Naver). Operated by LUNATICS GROUP LLC.

## Core pages

- [Explore designers](https://beautia.io/community): main web app — browse portfolios, filter by city and category, save favorites, book or message
- [Become a designer](https://beautia.io/community): free designer sign-up, portfolio upload, verified badge, shareable BEAUTIA ID card
- [Privacy policy](https://beautia.io/privacy.html): how personal data is collected and handled
- [Terms of service](https://beautia.io/terms.html): platform terms
- [Delete account or data](https://beautia.io/delete-account.html): request account or partial data deletion

## Featured designers

- [soin eyelash salon](https://beautia.io/d/21a1661c-4974-477a-8d0d-f806457db5a4): Osaka, Japan — eyelash extensions and lash perm (Instagram @soin_eyelash)
- [Woojin](https://beautia.io/d/e579ff23-4b1a-43c9-b9e2-49e6061668d6): Seoul, South Korea — hair cut, perm and color (Instagram @00.07.28)
- [STROK87 Brow Studio](https://beautia.io/d/3f4e1a4f-fe62-41ba-bb47-61b04358284e): Seoul, South Korea — semi-permanent brows, lips and skincare (Instagram @kbeauty_jenie)

## Optional

- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/beautia.collection): brand content, reels and new work
- [Contact and partnerships](mailto:hello@beautia.io): support, designer onboarding, brand partnerships

## 한국어 요약

Beautia는 전 세계 뷰티 디자이너의 실제 포트폴리오를 모아 보여주고 바로 예약·문의할 수 있는 양면 플랫폼입니다. 헤어·메이크업·네일·속눈썹·스킨·브라이덜·반영구. 현재 위치 기준 가까운 순 자동 정렬, 도시·카테고리 필터. 둘러보기 무료, 다국어(영/한/일/태/중). 예약은 앱 내 또는 디자이너의 기존 링크(네이버 등)로 연결됩니다.
